scope: fresh-seed zero-parameter query-only G1 after M1m G0 classified key ranking as dominant; no optimizer, model mutation, checkpoint selection, formal validation, test access, or reuse of G0 seeds
scientific_question: can the current causal PFC base-context act as a basin cue that projects onto the correct earlier event context without learned Q/K, additional memory, or oracle inputs, and is its nearest-neighbor margin sufficient for safe abstention
parent_result_boundary: on 384 fresh K8 probes, soft/hard/oracle-best/exact-correct were 0.6927/0.7448/1.0000/1.0000; the correct archival value exists and the original HPC downstream is healthy, but fixed cyclic key ranking is insufficient
source_conversion: parameter-free M1f with covariance-corrected content HPC ridge 0.001

event_archive.event_detector: rising edge of the causal balanced-action structural proposal
event_archive.latest_event: most recent detected event before the current query
event_archive.candidate_events: all detected event anchors strictly earlier than the latest event
event_archive.archival_value: frozen normalized M1f base_context at each candidate event

rankers.signature_hard_top1: deterministic earliest-index argmax of fixed cyclic-signature cosine, exactly matching M1m G0 hard baseline
rankers.context_basin_hard: deterministic earliest-index argmax of cosine between frozen base_context at the latest event and frozen base_context at each earlier candidate event
rankers.context_basin_shuffled_value: use the unchanged context-basin selected candidate index but replace its archival value by a deterministic one-step rotation within the same causal candidate list
rankers.oracle_best_archival_value: diagnostic-only argmax of candidate-value cosine to exact correct reference context
rankers.confidence: top1 minus top2 context-basin key cosine; zero when fewer than two candidates

allowed_for_context_basin: frozen cyclic action signatures for the baseline only
frozen causal base_context at the latest and earlier event anchors from the same episode
forbidden_model_inputs: return, conflict, correctness, or oracle mask
causal_input_contract.oracle_boundary: oracle-best and exact reference conditions may use metadata only after source, signature, basin, and shuffled candidates are emitted and only for query-only scoring

query_only_isolation: at most one scored query per episode is changed in any rollout; every prior address, HPC read, and HPC write remains source M1f
frozen_classification_rule: after implementation and exact/oracle/shuffled controls, classify RETRIEVAL_CONFIRMED only when every retrieval and confidence gate passes; classify IDENTITY_WITHOUT_ABSTENTION when every retrieval gate passes except confidence; classify RANKING_INSUFFICIENT when controls pass but one or more retrieval gates fail; otherwise classify CONTROL_OR_CEILING_FAILURE
post_result_rule: run all three seeds once and classify once; do not tune event definition, context key, tie break, shuffled control, confidence score, thresholds, or category order on seeds727151/737151/747151; G1 never unlocks formal access or training by itself
